posts.author: Najiya
posts.body:

what is the alternative?

posts.author: Najiya
posts.body:
It looks like the package structure has changed. Previously, I used to import it with
from langchain.text_splitter import RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter
, but now it’s available in the
langchain_text_splitters
module.

posts.author: KansaiUser
posts.body:
It looks like the package structure has changed. Previously, I used to import it with
from langchain.text_splitter import RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter
, but now it’s available in the
langchain_text_splitters
module.
In langchain 1.1.0 this does not work either

posts.author: KansaiUser
posts.body:
The solution was to use
api.python.langchain.com
langchain_text_splitters.character.RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter — 🦜🔗...
